---
name: report-formatter
description: >-
  Formats quarterly business reports into the corporate template. Use when
  the user asks to format or restyle a quarterly report. Do not use for
  invoices.
---

# Report formatter

1. Load the template.
2. Apply it and export.

Never alter the figures while formatting.

```text
input.md -> q4-report.docx
```

Validate the export opens cleanly; if not, fix the template and repeat.
